positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration featuring a vibrant forest scene viewed from a top-down perspective. The main subject is a perfect circle composed of various abstract jungle flora: lush, simplified tropical leaves (palms, ferns), gentle geometric river curves, and stylized meandering vines. The color palette must be highly contrasted, focusing on deep indigo blues, vibrant emerald greens, and pops of burnt orange for accent. The style should be clean, vector-graphic inspired, with bold, crisp silhouettes and strong linework, suitable for single-color screen printing on apparel. Central composition, perfect symmetry, high contrast, graphic novel aesthetic, flat digital art.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, low detail, watermark, signature, text, copyright, out of frame, messy, muddy colors, photographic, realistic, gradient, poor anatomy, extra limbs
